name: Parakeet STT
description: Fast CPU-based speech-to-text using Parakeet TDT INT8 models. 4x faster than real-time. Supports V2 (English optimized) and V3 (multilingual).

modelVersion.description: Model version: v2 for English (higher accuracy), v3 for multilingual (25 languages, auto-detect)

modelPath.description: Path to the Parakeet ONNX model directory (auto-set based on modelVersion)

daemonPath.description: Path to the parakeet daemon script

inactivityTimeoutMin.description: Minutes of inactivity before unloading the model

modelVersion.label: Model Version
modelVersion.help: v2 = English optimized (higher accuracy), v3 = Multilingual (25 European languages with auto-detect)

modelPath.label: Model Path
modelPath.help: Directory containing the Parakeet ONNX model files

inactivityTimeoutMin.label: Inactivity Timeout (minutes)
inactivityTimeoutMin.help: How long before the model unloads to save memory
